category_sources: source_facts.description says lazycontainer is a terminal UI for Apple Containers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives lazycontainer; source_facts.homepage is the official repository with the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a terminal UI for Apple Containers; source_facts.executables lists the CLI.
